fields.Name: OpenWater
fields.Description: OpenWater awards/grants/abstracts/fellowship platform connector — pull-centric sync of programs, applications, users, invoices, judges, rounds and nested review objects via the OpenWater Public API v2 (REST, ClientKey + ApiKey headers).

fields.Name: Program
fields.Description: OpenWater Program (door). Source schema: Models.Program.ProgramListItemModel. Access: /v2/Programs.

fields.Name: enableSessions
fields.Description: Are sessions enabled in a program

fields.Name: enableScheduler
fields.Description: Is scheduler enabled in a program

fields.Name: User
fields.Description: OpenWater User (door). Source schema: Models.User.UserListItemModel. Access: /v2/Users.

fields.Name: Invoice
fields.Description: OpenWater Invoice (door). Source schema: Models.Invoice.InvoiceListItemModel. Access: /v2/Invoices.

fields.Name: isVat
fields.Description: Is billing line item related to VAT

fields.Name: isManualAdjustment
fields.Description: Is billing line item related to manual adjustment

fields.Name: Session
fields.Description: OpenWater Session (door). Source schema: Models.Session.SessionListItemModel. Access: /v2/Sessions.

Configuration.LiteralCreateReason: Create CreateRequest requires typeId (int FK to SessionType); synced IOF has typeName (string) not typeId — generic flat body would 400. Connector overrides CreateRecord: resolve typeId from typeName via SessionType (or accept typeId input).

fields.Name: Rounds
fields.Description: OpenWater Rounds (embedded). Source schema: Models.Program.RoundModel. Access: Programs -> rounds[].

fields.Name: Fund
fields.Description: OpenWater Fund (door). Source schema: Models.Fund.FundListItemModel. Access: /v2/Funds.

fields.Name: JudgeTeam
fields.Description: OpenWater JudgeTeam (door). Source schema: Models.JudgeTeam.JudgeTeamListItemModel. Access: /v2/JudgeTeams.

fields.Name: Payment
fields.Description: OpenWater Payment (door). Source schema: Models.Invoice.PaymentListItemModel. Access: /v2/Invoices/Payments.

fields.Name: isManualAdjustment
fields.Description: Is payment related to manual adjustment

fields.Name: isPromissoryNote
fields.Description: Is payment related to promissory note

fields.Name: Refund
fields.Description: OpenWater Refund (door). Source schema: Models.Invoice.RefundListItemModel. Access: /v2/Invoices/Refunds.

fields.Name: ApplicationCategory
fields.Description: OpenWater ApplicationCategory (nested). Source schema: Models.ApplicationCategory.ApplicationCategoryListItemModel. Access: Programs -> programId -> ApplicationCategories.

fields.Name: FundTransaction
fields.Description: OpenWater FundTransaction (nested). Source schema: Models.FundTransaction.FundTransactionListItemModel. Access: Funds -> fundId -> Transactions.

fields.Name: JudgeAssignment
fields.Description: OpenWater JudgeAssignment (nested). Source schema: Models.JudgeAssignment.JudgeListItemModel. Access: Programs -> rounds[] -> roundId -> JudgeAssignments.

Configuration.LiteralCreateReason: Create AssignJudgeToRoundRequest requires {judgeUserId, roundId}; synced IOFs are {userId,...} — generic flat body would 400. Connector overrides CreateRecord: judgeUserId<-record.userId, roundId<-parent AccessPath round context.

fields.Name: judgeTeams
fields.Description: Judge teams where judge belongs to

fields.Name: JudgeRecusal
fields.Description: OpenWater JudgeRecusal (nested). Source schema: Models.Judge.JudgeRecusalListItemModel. Access: Programs -> rounds[] -> roundId -> Recusals.

fields.Name: OtherSessionItemType
fields.Description: OpenWater OtherSessionItemType (nested). Source schema: Models.OtherSessionItemType.OtherSessionItemTypeListItemModel. Access: Programs -> programId -> OtherSessionItemTypes.

fields.Name: Report
fields.Description: OpenWater Report (nested). Source schema: Models.Report.ReportListItemModel. Access: Programs -> rounds[] -> roundId -> ApplicationReports | JudgeReports; Programs -> programId -> SessionReports.

fields.Name: ScheduleDay
fields.Description: OpenWater ScheduleDay (nested). Source schema: Models.ScheduleDay.ScheduleDayListItemModel. Access: Programs -> programId -> Scheduler.Days.

fields.Name: ScheduleRoom
fields.Description: OpenWater ScheduleRoom (nested). Source schema: Models.ScheduleRoom.ScheduleRoomListItemModel. Access: Programs -> programId -> Scheduler.Rooms.

fields.Name: ScheduleTimeSlot
fields.Description: OpenWater ScheduleTimeSlot (nested). Source schema: Models.ScheduleTimeSlot.ScheduleTimeSlotListItemModel. Access: Programs -> programId -> Scheduler.TimeSlots.

Configuration.LiteralCreateReason: Create CreateRequest requires scheduleDayIds; synced IOFs lack that exact field (availableOnlyInDayIds is the read-side name) — generic flat body would omit it. Connector overrides CreateRecord to supply scheduleDayIds.
Configuration.LiteralUpdateReason: Update UpdateRequest requires scheduleDayIds (array of int); read-side IOF is availableOnlyInDayIds. Generic flat body omits/misnames it -> 422. Connector overrides UpdateRecord to supply scheduleDayIds from availableOnlyInDayIds. Mirrors LiteralCreateReason.

fields.Name: availableOnlyInDayIds
fields.Description: Schedule day Ids where time slot is available (available in all days if NULL or empty)

fields.Name: ScheduleItem
fields.Description: OpenWater ScheduleItem (nested). Source schema: Models.ScheduleItem.ScheduleItemListItemModel. Access: Programs -> programId -> Scheduler.ScheduleItems.

fields.Name: SessionType
fields.Description: OpenWater SessionType (nested). Source schema: Models.SessionType.SessionTypeListItemModel. Access: Programs -> programId -> SessionTypes.
